scripts.scrape: docker compose exec scraper-api python scripts/seed_sources.py && curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/admin/scrape -H "X-User-Id: 00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000ad" -H "X-User-Role: admin"
scripts.seed: docker compose exec scraper-api alembic upgrade head && docker compose exec rag-api alembic upgrade head && docker compose exec scraper-api python scripts/seed_sources.py && docker compose exec api python scripts/init_qdrant.py
scripts.deploy:web: corepack pnpm --dir apps/web build && echo "Deploy web manually with Vercel after setting production env vars."
